features: Works on carpet, dirt, or sand

sellingPoints: Develops fine motor skills and coordination
Durable metal components for long life
Great value at affordable price point

aiGeneratedContent.shortDescriptionEn: Build big dreams with the Construction Master! This realistic RC excavator features full 6-channel control, metal bucket, and authentic construction sounds. Young builders will love operating their own heavy machinery.
aiGeneratedContent.shortDescriptionZh: 用工程大师构建大大的梦想！这款逼真的遥控挖掘机具备完整的6通道控制、金属铲斗和真实的施工音效。小建筑师们会喜欢操作自己的重型机械。

marketingCopy.headlineEn: Build Your Dreams – RC Excavator Construction Master
marketingCopy.headlineZh: 构建你的梦想——工程大师遥控挖掘机
marketingCopy.bodyEn: More than just a toy, the Construction Master is a miniature engineering marvel. With its 6-channel remote controlling realistic arm movements, 360° rotating cab, and authentic LED work lights, it provides an immersive construction experience. The durable metal bucket and tracks ensure hours of indoor and outdoor play.
marketingCopy.bodyZh: 不仅仅是一个玩具，工程大师是一个微型工程奇迹。通过6通道遥控实现逼真的臂部运动、360度旋转驾驶室和真实LED工作灯，它提供沉浸式的施工体验。耐用的金属铲斗和履带确保数小时的室内外游戏时间。
